productDisplayName: John Players Men Striped Blue Shirt
description: Style note This john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with it's refined collar, silhouetted tailoring and it's fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression with this shirt - be it on lazy weekends or during after-hours dinner. The best bet for semi-formal Fridays, wear this with fitted denims and ankle boots! Product Details Blue and white striped shirt made of cotton fabric, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, brand embroidered above the left chest pocket and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean or machine wash with like colours only Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Trim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
